read: Alt ratios rolling over from a diverged state — rotation unwinding, risk coming off the curve.
sequence_hint: BTC_LED -> MEME_SEASON (SOL first) -> ALT_SEASON (ETH follows) -> BLOWOFF_RISK. This is the rotation ladder toward a euphoric top.
_doctrine: Descriptive rotation read from live SOL/BTC + ETH/BTC ratios over 21d. Tells you WHERE in the capital-rotation sequence the market is now (Lano's meme->alt->blowoff thesis). Context/confirmation for the cycle read, never an auto-gate.
